reasoning: 8x zoom reveals several AI tells. Most damning: the blue lightning-stripe highlights bleed into adjacent orange pixels with intermediate mixed-color pixels rather than a clean hard boundary — classic AI color diffusion. The orange/brown boot body uses ~5 distinct tones with gradual luminance steps instead of the 2-3 hard palette tones expected from hand-crafted pixel art. Outline weight is inconsistent: left boot silhouette alternates between 1px and 2px strokes on the same contour pass. The smaller sprite (upper-left, apparent 4x view) shows smeared/melted lace detail — individual pixel clusters blend together suggesting upscaling or diffusion-model hallucination. Boot asymmetry is beyond normal pose difference: right boot strap pixel count and placement does not mirror-match left boot geometry. Background is clean (no noise there), but the boot silhouette boundary has scattered 1-pixel noise dots. Semantic shape is recognizable as speed boots, so no outright semantic failure, but the cumulative artifact density pushes this to marginal.
